output.summary: Architectural rework: replaced content duplication (desktop tabs + mobile accordion with JS cloning) with a single <details>-based structure. Content exists once per tab, no duplication.

filesModified.purpose: Rewritten: desktop tablist + <details> children container (no separate mobile accordion area)
Rewritten: desktop tablist buttons + InnerBlocks with <details>-based TabsItem children
Rewritten: renders as <details> with <summary> (mobile accordion header) and content inside
Rewritten: <details>/<summary> with inline AdvancedRichText for tab title, inner blocks for content
Rewritten: works with <details> elements. Desktop tablist controls open/close, summary click prevented. Mobile uses native details/summary. Handles resize transitions.

architectureChanges.before: Desktop: tab panels in right column. Mobile: separate accordion area with content cloned via JS from desktop panels. Two copies of all content in DOM.
architectureChanges.after: Single <details> element per tab. Desktop: tablist buttons control which <details> is open, <summary> hidden via CSS (md:!hidden). Mobile: tablist hidden, <summary> visible as accordion headers. Content exists once, zero duplication.
keyDecisions: Each TabsItem renders as <details> with <summary> for mobile and content div for both modes
Desktop tablist (role=tablist) with buttons is rendered by parent Tabs block from synced tabsHeading/tabsDescription arrays
Summary elements hidden on desktop via md:!hidden, tablist hidden on mobile via hidden md:flex
JS prevents summary click on desktop (tablist controls open state), allows native behavior on mobile
On resize from mobile to desktop with none open, JS opens first tab
ARIA: tabpanel role on content divs in desktop mode, native details/summary semantics in mobile mode
Details border/rounded styling only on mobile (md:border-0 md:rounded-none), clean inside panels container on desktop

syncStatus.details: All classes and structure verified between TSX and PHP for both Tabs and TabsItem

fixesApplied.description: Replaced content duplication architecture with <details>-based single-source-of-truth
Desktop: details items show no border/rounded corners (md:border-0 md:rounded-none) - clean inside accent-lighter panel
Removed double padding (panels container md:p-6 + item md:p-0 instead of both having p-6)
